calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-25-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-25-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.
Scott D. Peebles, Esq. appeared for plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority.
Henry Kwan, property manager for San Francisco Housing Authority, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Stacey H. Stewart.

The plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---San Francisco Housing Authority Lease dated 07/18/06--------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---14 Day Notice to Pay Rent or Surrender Possession 11/09/07--------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority and against defendant STACEY H. STEWART as follows:

Plaintiff shall recover from defendant STACEY H. STEWART Rent and Per Diem in the sum of $6,219.00, Costs in the amount of $275.00, for a total judgment of $6,494.90.
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 895 Pacific Avenue, #433, San Francisco, CA 94133. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-21-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Henry Kwan, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority
Scott Peebles, Esq. for plaintiff

No appearance by defendant Stacy H. Stewart.

Settlement conference off calendar. Trial date remains.

Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk Linda Fong, not reported (218)
